configurations.name: finatt-web
configurations.//: Plain `bash -c`, not `-lc`: a login shell runs profile scripts first and, when the launcher's inherited cwd is unreadable, floods stderr with getcwd/chdir errors that bury the real failure.
configurations.//autoPort: 3000 is held by the FinBud-LiveKit dev server, so take any free port. The dev script is `next dev -H 0.0.0.0` with no -p flag, which lets Next pick up the PORT env var the launcher assigns. NOTE: Supabase only redirects to allow-listed origins, so sign-in stays broken on a non-3000 port until NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL and the Supabase redirect allowlist are updated to match.
